name: super-ux
description: Full-cycle UX for AI agents: personas, JTBD, journeys, user stories -> traced UX scenarios -> evidence-backed audits -> prioritized fix plans.

plugins.name: super-ux
plugins.description: Covers UX at every project stage: ux-foundation (personas, JTBD, journeys, user stories), ux-scenarios (docs/ux/scenarios.md as the source of truth, traced to stories), ux-audit (code vs scenarios with acceptance criteria + chain coverage), /ux action-menu entry point, scenario-first hard rule.
